channel.title: Dear Lavion's Profile
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Dear Lavion's Profile

item.title: Github Page = Quartz + Obsidian
item.description: About Repository dearlavion.github.io/ is generated by quartz All obsidian generated notes are maintained in main branch Local Test: cd quartz/ yarn run quartz build --serve To update deploy gitHub page: Generate files in main branch first cd quartz/ yarn run quartz build Generated new files are in ...

item.title: 1. Artificial Intelligence (AI)
item.description: What AI is the broad field, ability of machines to mimic human intelligence: such as reasoning, decision-making, and understanding language.

item.title: 2. Machine Learning (ML)
item.description: What ML is a subset of AI where systems learn patterns from data instead of being explicitly programmed.

item.title: 3. Deep Learning (DL)
item.description: What DL is a subset of ML that uses multi-layer neural networks to learn complex patterns.

item.title: 4. Generative AI (Gen AI)
item.description: What Generative AI is a class of models that create new content such as text, images, code, or audio.

item.title: 5. Large Language Model (LLM)
item.description: What LLMs are a type of Generative AI specialized in understanding and generating human language.

item.title: 1. What is Devops?
item.description: What DevOps is an organizational and technical approach that optimizes software delivery by connecting development and operations teams to unify the infrastructure.

item.title: 1. What is Java
item.description: Java is a platform-independent, object-oriented programming language that runs on the JVM and is commonly used for backend, enterprise, and Android development.

item.title: 4. Abstraction
item.description: What Abstraction hides implementation details and shows only essential behavior. Why To reduce complexity and improve maintainability.

item.title: 5. Java Modifiers
item.description: What Modifiers are keywords in Java that change the behavior or accessibility of classes, methods, and variables.
